title: helichrysum rugulosum
intro: Helichrysum rugulosum, a member of the sunflower family (Asteraceae), is a plant native to South Africa, known for its yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum rugulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum rugulosum can be found in various forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
